action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Miresse, Palmeri, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, DeSmidt, Emerson, Hysell, Joers, Roe, Stroud, Subeck, Tenorio, Vining and Madison; 
cosponsored by Senators Habush Sinykin, Smith, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, L. Johnson, Ratcliff, Roys and Wirch
